markets.no_sub_title: Biggest Upset Seed Margin: 9+
markets.rules_primary: If the greatest seeding disadvantage overcome by any winner in the full tournament of the 2026 Men's College Basketball Tournament is at least 9, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this market, an upset occurs when a team with a higher numerical seed defeats a team with a lower numerical seed. Upset seed margin is calculated as the difference between the seed numbers of the two teams in a game where the higher numerical-seeded team wins (for example, if a 12-seed defeats a 5-seed, the upset seed margin is 7).
